name: Tool Calling
description: Evaluates function/tool calling quality: selection, argument quality, reasoning, and error handling.

perspectives.name: Tool Selection
perspectives.description: Correct tool chosen for the task
perspectives.criteria: Did the model select the appropriate tool(s) for the given task?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Wrong tool, 2=Suboptimal tool, 3=Acceptable tool, 4=Good tool choice, 5=Perfect tool selection

perspectives.name: Argument Quality
perspectives.description: Arguments passed to tools are correct and well-formed
perspectives.criteria: Are the arguments passed to the tool correct, complete, and properly formatted?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Wrong/missing args, 2=Some incorrect args, 3=Mostly correct, 4=Good args, 5=Perfect arguments

perspectives.name: Reasoning
perspectives.description: Model explains its tool use rationale
perspectives.criteria: Does the model provide clear reasoning for its tool usage?

perspectives.name: Error Handling
perspectives.description: Graceful handling of tool errors or missing tools
perspectives.criteria: Does the model handle tool errors or unavailability gracefully?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Crashes/ignores errors, 2=Poor handling, 3=Basic handling, 4=Good handling, 5=Excellent error handling
